name: Sunshine Children's Dentistry
tagline: Bringing sunshine to every smile in Santa Rosa
seoDescription: Sunshine Children's Dentistry is a brand-new pediatric dental office on Guerneville Road in Santa Rosa, led by Dr. Navid Mehdipour, DMD, MPH. Gentle, kid-first care from the very first tooth — preventative, restorative, special-needs, and safe sedation dentistry.

contact.address: 1401 Guerneville Rd, Suite 300, Santa Rosa, CA 95403

images.heroAlt: The bright, sunlit reception area at Sunshine Children's Dentistry in Santa Rosa, with the sunburst logo on the wall and a kid-friendly waiting nook

sections.heading: Gentle dental care, built entirely around kids
sections.subheading: From a baby's very first tooth through the teen years, Sunshine Children's Dentistry makes every visit calm, comfortable, and confidence-building — in a brand-new, kid-first office on Guerneville Road.
badges: Welcoming little ones from the first tooth
Safe sedation with a board-certified pediatric anesthesiologist

image.alt: The bright, sunlit reception area at Sunshine Children's Dentistry in Santa Rosa, with the sunburst logo on the wall and a kid-friendly waiting nook

sections.heading: Dentistry that meets kids where they are
sections.intro: Every detail of the practice — from the play nook to the pace of each visit — is designed so children feel safe, respected, and at ease.

items.title: Kids are the whole focus
items.body: This is a dedicated pediatric practice. The team takes extra time to understand each child's unique needs, so a checkup feels reassuring instead of scary.

items.title: Care from the first tooth
items.body: Little ones are welcome from their very first tooth, building healthy habits and a positive relationship with the dentist from day one.

items.title: Safe sedation when it's needed
items.body: For anxious children or more involved treatment, sedation is offered using the safest, most advanced methods, overseen by a board-certified pediatric anesthesiologist.

items.title: Preventative Dentistry
items.description: Cleanings, exams, fluoride, and guidance that keep small teeth healthy and head off problems before they start.

items.title: Dental Sealants
items.description: A thin protective coating on the chewing surfaces of back teeth to guard against cavities where kids need it most.

items.title: Restorative Dentistry
items.description: Gentle fillings and restorations to treat cavities and keep growing smiles strong and comfortable.

items.title: Infant Dentistry
items.description: Early visits for babies and toddlers — establishing healthy habits and easing parents into the first steps of dental care.

items.title: Special Needs Dentistry
items.description: Patient, accommodating care for children with special healthcare needs, in a calm and supportive environment.

items.title: Emergency & Sedation Dentistry
items.description: Prompt help when a tooth can't wait, plus safe sedation options overseen by a board-certified pediatric anesthesiologist.

sections.heading: Designed so the dentist isn't scary
sections.body: Sunshine was built from the ground up as a children's office — bright, playful, and paced for kids. The goal is simple: positive early experiences that turn into a lifetime of healthy habits.
points: A welcoming play area and kid-sized waiting nook
Open, sunlit treatment bays with a friendly feel
Time and patience for nervous first-timers
An in-house Sunshine Membership plan for families without insurance

sections.heading: A dentist who came to Santa Rosa to put down roots
body: Sunshine Children's Dentistry is led by Dr. Navid Mehdipour, DMD, MPH, who brings more than two decades of dental experience and a lifelong passion for caring for children. He earned his dental degree before completing advanced training and a Master of Public Health at A.T. Still University School of Dentistry in Arizona.

He moved to Santa Rosa drawn to the community where his wife was born and raised — and built Sunshine as the kind of children's practice he'd want for his own family: calm, modern, and centered entirely on making kids comfortable.
highlights: Trained at A.T. Still University, Arizona

image.alt: The play area at Sunshine Children's Dentistry with a child-sized table, toys, and bright modern furnishings

sections.heading: Ready for a visit that's actually fun?
sections.body: Find us at 1401 Guerneville Rd, Suite 300 in Santa Rosa. Call (707) 800-8002 or book online — new patients and first teeth always welcome.

sections.heading: Everything your child's smile needs, in one place
sections.subheading: Preventative, restorative, infant, special-needs, emergency, and sedation dentistry — all under one roof, all built around kids.

items.title: Preventative Dentistry
items.description: Regular cleanings, exams, fluoride treatments, and personalized guidance to keep cavities away. We focus on building good habits early so checkups stay easy year after year.

items.title: Dental Sealants
items.description: A quick, painless protective coating sealed onto the grooves of back teeth — one of the most effective ways to prevent decay in children's molars.

items.title: Infant Dentistry
items.description: We welcome little ones from their very first tooth. Early visits help babies and toddlers get comfortable, and give parents simple, practical care advice.

items.title: Restorative Dentistry
items.description: Gentle, kid-friendly fillings and restorations to treat cavities and repair teeth — keeping growing smiles strong, healthy, and comfortable.

items.title: Special Needs Dentistry
items.description: Compassionate, accommodating dental care for children with special healthcare needs, delivered patiently in a calm and supportive setting.

items.title: Emergency Dentistry
items.description: Toothaches and dental injuries don't keep a schedule. When something can't wait, we're here to help your child get comfortable fast.

items.title: Sedation Dentistry
items.description: For anxious children or more extensive treatment, we offer sedation using the safest and most advanced methods — provided by a board-certified pediatric anesthesiologist.

images.alt: An open, sunlit treatment bay at Sunshine Children's Dentistry with bright orange pediatric dental chairs and floor-to-ceiling windows
A hygiene station beside a colorful wall mural of a smiling tooth, toothbrush, and floss characters
The play area at Sunshine Children's Dentistry with a child-sized table, toys, and bright modern furnishings

sections.heading: Have a question about your child's care?
sections.body: Call (707) 800-8002 or send a note — we're happy to help you figure out the right next step.

sections.heading: A children's practice, built from scratch for children
sections.subheading: Brand-new, bright, and centered on one thing: making kids feel safe at the dentist.

sections.heading: Experience, with a soft touch
body: Sunshine Children's Dentistry is led by Dr. Navid Mehdipour, DMD, MPH. He brings more than twenty years of dental experience and a lifelong passion for caring for children, paired with advanced training and a Master of Public Health from A.T. Still University School of Dentistry in Arizona.

Dr. Mehdipour moved to Santa Rosa drawn to the community where his wife was born and raised, and opened Sunshine as the kind of practice he believes every child deserves — modern, gentle, and built so a trip to the dentist feels reassuring instead of frightening.
highlights: Master of Public Health, A.T. Still University

image.alt: Open, sunlit treatment bay at Sunshine Children's Dentistry with bright pediatric dental chairs

sections.heading: Brand-new and built around kids
sections.body: Sunshine occupies a fresh, purpose-built space on Guerneville Road — bright, open, and outfitted with up-to-date technology to handle every kind of children's dental need under one roof.
points: Multiple treatment chairs, including private rooms
A play area and kid-sized waiting nook

items.q: When should my child first see the dentist?
items.a: We welcome little ones from their very first tooth. Early visits help children get comfortable and let us guide healthy habits from the start.

items.q: Do you offer sedation for anxious kids?
items.a: Yes. For children who feel anxious or need more extensive treatment, we offer sedation using safe, advanced methods overseen by a board-certified pediatric anesthesiologist.

items.q: Do you see children with special needs?
items.a: We do. We provide patient, accommodating care for children with special healthcare needs in a calm, supportive environment.

items.q: What if we don't have dental insurance?
items.a: Ask us about the in-house Sunshine Membership plan, designed to make routine pediatric care affordable for families without insurance. Call (707) 800-8002 and we'll walk you through the options.

sections.heading: Visit Sunshine Children's Dentistry
sections.blurb: Find us at 1401 Guerneville Rd, Suite 300, Santa Rosa, CA 95403, or call (707) 800-8002. Open Monday–Friday 7am–4pm and Saturday 8am–1pm. New patients and first teeth always welcome.
